questionHtml:
The enthalpy changes for two reactions are given.

Br2 (l) + F2 (g) → 2BrF (g)         ΔH = x kJ
Br2 (l) + 3F2 (g) → 2BrF3 (g)      ΔH = y kJ

What is the enthalpy change for the following reaction?

BrF (g) + F2 (g) → BrF3 (g)

A.  x – y

B.  –x + y

C.  1 2 (–x + y)

D.  1 2 (x – y)
